events.title: How We Met
events.description: We crossed paths at a university cultural festival in Colombo. A simple conversation about traditional Kandyan dancing sparked a connection that would last a lifetime.

events.title: The Engagement
events.description: Surrounded by our closest friends and family, we exchanged rings under the beautiful sunset at Galle Face Green.

events.title: The Wedding
events.description: We are thrilled to invite you to celebrate our love and commitment as we embark on this new journey together.

preShoot.title: Our Pre-Shoot
preShoot.description: A glimpse into our magical journey. We captured these special moments to share our love story with you.

weddingEvents.title: Poruwa Ceremony
weddingEvents.description: Join us for the traditional Sri Lankan Poruwa ceremony where we will perform the customary rituals to unite our families.

weddingEvents.title: Wedding Reception
weddingEvents.description: Celebrate with us over dinner, drinks, and dancing as we embark on our new journey together.
